meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Stuck with Basic Apps
content.seo_description: Break through the 'basic app' barrier. Master this professional client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-end SaaS projects faster.
content.answer_block: Stop building basic CRUD apps. To scale, you must transition to an AI-augmented, agentic workflow. By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous feature implementation, you can automate repetitive boilerplate, reduce development time by 70%, and ship production-grade, complex SaaS solutions that command premium client fees.
content.intro:
You’re staring at yet another project folder, knowing the code is functional but fundamentally amateur. Clients are asking for sophisticated features—multi-tenant auth, real-time data streaming, AI-driven analytics—but you're stuck in a loop of basic UI components and fragile backend logic. The weight of 'good enough' is silently killing your reputation as a high-tier developer.

It’s time to stop coding like a student and start building like a principal engineer. By leveraging agentic tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can externalize your cognitive load, enforce architectural rigor, and turn complex client requirements into robust, scalable systems without sacrificing your sanity.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the system boundaries before writing a single line of code. Use Antigravity to generate a clean, modular structure that supports future-proofing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular SaaS architecture using Next.js 15, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include a robust folder structure for server actions, database schema definitions, and middleware for role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project structure based on the provided Antigravity architecture spec.'

steps.title: Database Schema Synthesis
steps.description: Stop manually typing migrations. Automate your database design to ensure referential integrity and performance from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a PostgreSQL schema for a multi-tenant SaaS platform. Include tables for Organizations, Users, Subscriptions, and AuditLogs with appropriate indexes and RLS policies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Apply the generated SQL schema to the Supabase local dev environment and create migration files.'

steps.title: Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to handle the heavy lifting of complex logic implementation, ensuring code quality standards are strictly met.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server action for handling Stripe webhooks, including user subscription status updates and error logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the Stripe webhook handler in the server-actions folder. Ensure strict type safety and error handling.'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Don't ship without validation. Automate your unit and integration tests to ensure your app stays robust during rapid iterations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Playwright test scripts for the primary onboarding flow, covering successful registration and failed authentication scenarios.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a test suite in /tests. Run the tests to verify the core authentication flow functionality.'

steps.title: Deployment & CI/CD
steps.description: Streamline your delivery pipeline so you can focus on building, not devops. Set up automated environment promotion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Vercel-compatible GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, testing, and deployment to staging on every push to the develop branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Configure the GitHub Actions workflow file for automated CI/CD deployment to Vercel.'

pro_tips: Always force the AI to write unit tests before implementing the logic; it reduces debugging time by 40%.
Keep your system prompt in a local .claudeignore file to prevent the model from hallucinating unnecessary dependencies.
Use 'Chain of Thought' prompting in Antigravity to force the model to explain the architectural trade-offs before outputting code.
Treat your CLI history as a documentation log; use Claude Code's session summary to generate your project README automatically.
Never accept the first output; always instruct the AI to 'critique its own solution for security vulnerabilities' before finalizing.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, begin integrating an observability tool like Sentry to monitor your production deployments, ensuring your new 'high-end' apps remain stable under load.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact blueprint to transform from a 'basic' coder into a high-leverage SaaS architect. Don't let another client project stagnate in the 'basic app' phase. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
